news.headline: Movie theaters AMC and Cinemark saw a significant spike in box office numbers on Black Friday, according to research.
Snappt releases new fraud guide based on largest multifamily survey, highlighting latest fraud trends.
news.summary: Snappt, a leading provider of fraud detection services in multifamily property management, has issued a report on applicant fraud trends. The report, released in Los Angeles on December 10, 2024, reveals new insights and solutions in combating fraud. Snappt's report sheds light on the latest findings regarding applicant fraud in the industry.

news.headline: Celebrate New Year's Eve at exclusive 2025 parties at Sheraton Hotel Parsippany, Westin Morristown, and Hanover Marriott in NJ.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Morristown, New Jersey, an exclusive New Year's Eve event is set to dazzle attendees. Organized by NewYearsNJ.com, this lavish party will be held at three of the state's most opulent venues, including the prestigious Sheraton hotel. Guests can anticipate a night of sophistication and thrill as they usher in the new year. This celebration promises to be the highlight of New Jersey's New Year's Eve events, offering unparalleled luxury and festivities. Stay tuned for further details on this highly-anticipated event.

news.headline: Cardano's price drop today is due to lower user activity and strong resistance, with focus on ADA at $0.80.
news.summary: A decline in user engagement and strong selling pressure are contributing to a decrease in Cardano's prices today, with bears targeting an ADA price of $0.80.

news.headline: VergeIO and Solidigm collaborate on VergeOS Version 4.13, setting new benchmarks in HCI performance.
news.summary: A company based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, VergeIO, has unveiled VergeOS Version 4.13, a significant update in partnership with Solidigm, a key player in NAND flash memory solutions. This release marks a milestone in hyperconverged infrastructure (HCI) by introducing cutting-edge improvements in performance, scalability, and cost-effectiveness for enterprise settings. Through rigorous testing using 64K block sizes, this update promises to deliver more realistic performance metrics in real-world scenarios.

news.headline: Digital Matrix Systems partners with Stratyfy to utilize AI/ML for small to midsize lenders' credit decisions.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, a strategic partnership has been formed between Digital Matrix Systems and Stratyfy to empower small to midsize lenders with the ability to integrate artificial intelligence and machine learning into their credit evaluation processes. This collaboration aims to provide lenders with advanced technology solutions for making informed credit decisions.

news.headline: New SEC chair nominee blames US for FTX crypto disaster, stirring controversy. #Trump #SEC #FTX
Cousins Properties to buy 601 West 2nd Street in Austin for $521.8 million. Office property spanning 804,000 square feet.
news.summary: In Atlanta on December 10, 2024, Cousins Properties (NYSE: CUZ) revealed their plans to purchase 601 West 2nd Street, known as Sail Tower, a prestigious office property in Austin spanning 804,000 square feet. The agreed net purchase price for this acquisition is $521.8 million.

news.headline: Bank of America's CashPro® App to exceed $1 trillion in payment approvals by 2024, offering clients control over their payments.
news.summary: Corporate clients are increasingly using mobile platforms for enhanced oversight and management of their payments. Bank of America's CashPro App is projected to facilitate over $1 trillion in payment approvals by the conclusion of 2024. This trend signifies a growing demand for convenient and efficient financial services among businesses.

news.headline: WAVJA announces new indoor lighting-based renewable energy system launching in 2025 to address energy challenges.
news.summary: In Marlton, New Jersey on December 10, 2024, a company called WAVJA is making strides in revolutionizing energy solutions in response to the increasing challenges posed by extreme weather events on the global energy sector. The demand for reliable renewable energy options has never been higher, with the company's Photon Energy technology offering promising solutions.

news.headline: Virginia artist Bård Ionson's digital art exhibit "Vanishing of the Genuine" displayed on thousands of screens across Europe, Africa, and Asia.
news.summary: In Manassas, Virginia on December 10, 2024, an artist from Virginia is gaining global recognition for his innovative work in AI and generative art. Bård Ionson's digital art exhibition is captivating audiences across Europe, Africa, and Asia, reaching thousands of screens. Ionson's groundbreaking art is making a significant impact internationally.

news.headline: Goldfingers Aesthetics in Lake Mary, Florida, offers medspa & plastic surgery services for a youthful glow this holiday season.
news.summary: In Lake Mary, Florida on December 10, 2024, Goldfingers Aesthetics is encouraging people to treat themselves to the present of rejuvenation during the holidays. Providing a variety of medspa and plastic surgery options that aim to elevate appearance and self-assurance, the clinic presents a chance to enhance beauty and confidence.

news.headline: CoreWeave, backed by Nvidia, disrupts cloud market with AI chip access, plans 2025 IPO, could boost Nvidia stock.
news.summary: Nvidia's stock may see an increase in value with the emergence of new cloud service providers like CoreWeave, who will have access to AI chips. CoreWeave is gearing up for an initial public offering (IPO) in 2025, shaking up the cloud market. This move is expected to influence Nvidia's performance significantly in the coming years.

news.headline: Google stock performance in 2024 on par with S&P 500, lags behind Magnificent Seven. In 2025, AI developments crucial.
news.summary: In 2024, Google's stock performance is aligned with the S&P 500, but falls behind the majority of the top companies dubbed the "Magnificent Seven." Looking ahead to 2025, the advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) is anticipated to play a crucial role in the tech industry. With rumors of a potential ban on TikTok possibly boosting YouTube, there is speculation on whether purchasing Google stock would be a wise investment opportunity. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: American Airlines stock upgraded due to improving Q4 outlook. Alaska Air sees rally on growth plan, new hub & guidance.
news.summary: Shares of American Airlines received an upgrade following an improved outlook for the fourth quarter. The stock saw a boost in response to this news. Additionally, Alaska Air experienced a rally after unveiling its strategic growth plan, which includes establishing a new global hub. The airline also provided strong guidance, leading to an increase in its stock. These positive developments led to a rise in shares for both companies, showcasing investor optimism in the airline industry.

news.headline: MongoDB stock fell despite Q3 earnings beating expectations, driven by a 22% sales increase.
news.summary: Following Q3 earnings that surpassed expectations, MongoDB stock experienced a decline despite the strong performance. The company reported a 22% increase in sales, driving the positive results. The stock fell after a recent surge in software shares, highlighting the mixed market response to MongoDB's impressive performance.

news.headline: Founder Alan Rhode leads Modern Wealth, a private wealth advisory firm in Blue Bell, PA, setting new standards for entrepreneurs.
news.summary: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania on Dec. 10, 2024, Alan Rhode, the CEO and founder of Modern Wealth, a private wealth advisory firm, is making waves with his unparalleled knowledge and fresh strategies. Based in Blue Bell, PA, Modern Wealth stands out as an independent, fee-only firm, setting a trend for the industry.

news.headline: Noetic Consultants launches "Mastering AI for Brand Building and Marketing Content Creation" training on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A marketing and leadership firm based in BETHESDA, Md., announced on Dec. 10, 2024, the launch of a new training program titled "Mastering AI for Brand Building and Marketing Content Creation." Noetic Consultants, a woman-owned company, aims to empower marketers with innovative skills to drive growth. This hands-on program is designed to assist professionals in leveraging artificial intelligence for improving brand building and content creation strategies.

news.headline: Prescient Edge Corp. wins "Program of the Year" for U.S. Naval AI and Unmanned Systems at Greater Washington GovCon Awards 2024.
news.summary: An esteemed recognition was presented to the Prescient Edge Corporation (PEC) at the Greater Washington GovCon Awards 2024, as they were honored with the "Program of the Year" award. This recognition lauded PEC for their groundbreaking initiatives alongside the U.S. Naval Forces Central Command (NAVCENT) Task Force 59. The esteemed award underscores PEC's innovative work and dedication to excellence in their collaboration with NAVCENT, showcasing their commitment to advancing successful initiatives within the defense sector.

news.headline: Greenworks opens sustainable support center in California, supporting shift to battery-powered outdoor solutions.
news.summary: A new facility has opened in Los Angeles to support California's transition to battery-powered outdoor solutions. Greenworks, a renowned provider of sustainable outdoor products, has officially launched its new Greenworks Commercial branch on Dec. 10, 2024, in Mooresville, N.C. This move signifies a significant step towards eco-friendly alternatives in outdoor equipment.

news.headline: myKaarma CEO Ujj Nath awarded for innovative service solutions in auto industry. Key features: Buy Now, Pay Later. (100)
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, on December 10, 2024, myKaarma, a top provider of communication and payment software for automotive dealerships, showcased its cutting-edge innovations such as Buy Now, Pay Later, and strategies for crisis management. The company's CEO made the announcement, underscoring their position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Entenmann's launches Big Chunk Soft Baked Cookies in 3 flavors, bold taste and portable, on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Just out of the oven, the latest soft-baked, square cookies offer a burst of flavor and convenient sweetness. Horsham, Pennsylvania - On December 10, 2024 - Treat yourself to a treat! Entenmann's®, a renowned baked goods label, has launched Big Chunk Soft Baked Cookies.

news.headline: Daylight Studio transforms fashion with innovative event 'When Fashion Moves' in NYC on Oct 26, 2024, in a 13,000 sq ft venue.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Daylight Studio in Manhattan's Hudson Yards, NYC, altered the conventional runway show format on October 26, 2024. This renowned fashion hub, spanning 13,000 square feet and known for its impressive ceilings and large windows, showcased the evolution of the fashion industry.

news.headline: Dunwoody College of Technology marks 110 years in technical education with Founders Day celebration on Dec. 14.
news.summary: On December 14, Dunwoody College of Technology in Minnesota will commemorate its Founders Day, marking 110 years of excellence in technical and skilled trades education. Established in 1914, the college has played a significant role in shaping the industry. Founded in Minneapolis, the institution continues to impact the community through its commitment to providing quality education and training in relevant fields. The celebration will highlight the college's rich history and contributions to the region's workforce, emphasizing its ongoing dedication to innovation and success in the realm of technical education.

news.headline: Dixie County Public Schools introduce 23 new electric buses, one of the largest fleets in the state.
news.summary: Cross City, Florida, as of December 10, 2024 - Dixie County Public Schools (DCPS) proudly unveils the addition of 23 new electric school buses to its fleet, establishing one of the largest electric school bus fleets in the state. This move highlights DCPS's commitment to sustainability and eco-friendly transportation.

news.headline: SEPTA to add 100 Conduent 3D fare gates in Philadelphia to prevent fare evasion at 9 transit stations.
news.summary: Florham Park, New Jersey - Conduent Transportation, a leading provider of smart mobility technology solutions and a business unit of Conduent Incorporated (stock symbol: CNDT), disclosed that the Southeastern Pennsylvania Transportation Authority (SEPTA) has approved a project to deploy around 100 new 3D fare gates across nine transit stations in Philadelphia. The initiative comes as part of SEPTA's collaboration with Conduent, leveraging its 3D Fare Gate Solution to enhance security and monitor fare evasion.

news.headline: Market for data center physical security to grow from USD 1.31B in 2023 to USD 2.57B by 2029 with 11.89% CAGR, relying on vendor-operator relationships.
news.summary: Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com shows that the Data Center Physical Security Market was worth USD 1.31 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 2.57 billion by 2029, indicating a CAGR of 11.89%. The market's competitiveness is influenced by the dynamic between vendors and data center operators, with factors such as product range, pricing, and implementation playing significant roles.

news.headline: Fitch: Canadian dollar will continue to weaken given interest rate differentials, which could offset some of impact of higher tariffs from the US.
TimberTech® chosen by Fast Company as one of 2024 Brands That Matter for cultural relevance and business impact.
news.summary: A leading provider of premium composite decking, TimberTech®, under The AZEK Company (NYSE: AZEK), has recently been recognized by Fast Company as one of the 2024 Brands That Matter in the Benchmark Brands category. This distinction highlights brands that excelled in cultural relevance, business impact, and emotional connection with consumers. TimberTech’s innovative marketing strategies for decking and railing products have earned them this prestigious acknowledgment.

news.headline: Fitch: We expect modest improvements in us fiscal outturn in 2025 on cyclical rebound in personal & corporate taxes, higher capital gains, tariffs.
Fitch: We expect a modest slowdown in growth in US and Canada, lower inflation and continued cuts in policy rates.

Global microgreens market expected to grow at 10.5% CAGR, reaching $7.97 billion by 2032, due to rising demand for healthy, nutritious foods and indoor farming techniques. Broccoli leads as the top-selling variety. Indoor vertical farming gaining popularity, offering increased land productivity. Indoor farming addresses food demand increases, declining agricultural output due to factors like limited fertile land resources and adverse weather conditions. Rise in purchasing power in Asia-Pacific driving demand for luxury cuisine. Main challenges include limited crop range for microgreens and shortage of skilled labor.
news.summary: The Global Microgreens Market was valued at USD 3.24 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 7.97 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 10.5%. Microgreens, sensitive vegetable greens, are used for enhancing dishes like pasta and salads due to their flavors and textures. Indoor vertical and greenhouse farming methods are driving market growth, with the broccoli sector leading in market share due to its health benefits. The market is segmented by type, farming methods, distribution channels, end users, and regions. Indoor vertical farming is gaining popularity due to its controlled environment benefits. Market drivers include the rise in indoor farming interest, while increasing purchasing power and limited skilled labor are seen as market opportunities and restraining factors, respectively.

news.headline: Menen Group names Daniel Whalen as Technical Director for New York expansion, accommodating growing Northeastern markets.
news.summary: A water cleantech collective rooted in the Heartland has expanded its core leadership team to keep pace with increasing demand in Northeastern markets. Menen Group, headquartered in Fayetteville, Arkansas, welcomed Daniel Whalen as the fifth member of its leadership team on December 10, 2024. This strategic move comes as the collective continues to gain traction in the region and signifies a focus on growth and expansion in new markets.

news.headline: Dr. Alexis LeVee of City of Hope awarded Biocodex Microbiota Foundation's 2024 USA National Research Grant.
news.summary: In Bedminster, New Jersey on December 10, 2024, the Biocodex Microbiota Foundation, a non-affiliated organization established by Biocodex, has granted the 2024 USA Microbiome Research Grant to Alexis LeVee, MD, who serves as the Chief Hematology and Medical Oncology Fellow at City of Hope, a renowned national cancer institution.

news.headline: Federal Reserve to cut Fed Funds Rate to 3.50%-3.75% or lower by end-2025, say 56 of 97 economists - Poll.
federal Reserve to cut fed Funds Rate by 25 bps on December 18 to 4.25%-4.50%, say 93 of 103 economists - Poll.
KULR Xero Vibe Solution launches on NVIDIA Jetson Edge AI platform to address operational challenges.
news.summary: KULR's Xero Vibe™ solution works in conjunction with NVIDIA's Jetson edge AI platform to tackle significant operational issues, specifically focusing on minimizing vibration.

news.headline: Demandbase and Salesforce collaborate to integrate intent data into Sales Cloud Prospecting Center; announced on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Demandbase, a prominent account-based go-to-market platform for B2B enterprises, revealed a new integration. The company's intent data is now incorporated into the Salesforce Sales Cloud Prospecting Center. This collaboration with Salesforce aims to enhance sales efforts by providing valuable insights. This partnership was announced in San Francisco on Dec. 10, 2024.

news.headline: Kunes Auto & RV partners with Treehouse for EV charging solutions. Dec. 10, 2024 - Midwest group offers home charging for electric vehicle customers.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Milwaukee, the Kunes Auto & RV Group, a Midwest automotive group, revealed a new partnership with Treehouse, a specialized EV home charging installation company. This collaboration aims to offer complete home charging solutions for electric vehicle customers within its network.

news.headline: Baird Medical Group plans 2025 strategy after successful 2024. Meetings in Guangzhou. #BDMD #MedicalTech
news.summary: In early December 2024, Baird Medical Group (NASDAQ: BDMD), a prominent player in the field of minimally invasive medical technologies, hosted its annual review and planning meeting for the upcoming year in Guangzhou, China. The gathering took place at the Baird Capital Tower and spanned two days, serving as a platform for discussions and strategic planning for the year ahead.

news.headline: Flowfinity released insights to aid business leaders in overcoming obstacles to AI tech adoption for innovation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2024, Flowfinity, a prominent process management platform, released their recent findings aimed at assisting business executives in addressing common challenges that may impede the integration of new AI technologies and hinder innovation. The insights provided by Flowfinity aim to ensure businesses remain competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: 37% of smart TV owners use Samsung most; 19th annual CONNECTIONS™ Summit at CES will address smart home growth.
news.summary: The 19th annual CONNECTIONS™ Summit at CES will focus on the expanding smart home sector with participation from key industry players including VIZIO, ADT Multifamily, Alarm.com, Johnson Controls, Nice Group, and others. Scheduled for December 10, 2024 in Dallas, the summit organized by Parks Associates will address the latest trends and innovations within the smart home industry.

news.headline: Rupert Murdoch plans to appeal after losing bid to give son Lachlan control of his empire in a legal defeat.
news.summary: Rupert Murdoch, a prominent media mogul, was unsuccessful in his attempt to modify a family trust in favor of his son Lachlan, ensuring control of the empire upon his passing. Despite this setback, the nonagenarian plans to challenge the decision through an appeal process.

news.headline: Asahi Kasei wins 2024 TSMC Excellent Performance Award for Pimel™ dielectric used in semiconductor packaging.
news.summary: Asahi Kasei, a company based in Tokyo and Novi, Mich., along with a branch in Düsseldorf, Germany, was recently honored with the prestigious 2024 TSMC Excellent Performance Award for its Pimel™ product. This recognition celebrates the outstanding achievements of Asahi Kasei in the industry.

news.headline: Kopin Corp. regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price, receives letter from Nasdaq confirming compliance.
news.summary: Westborough, Massachusetts - Kopin Corporation (Nasdaq: KOPN), a prominent provider of specialized optical systems and high-performance microdisplays, shared today that it received a letter from Nasdaq. The letter noted that Kopin Corporation has managed to meet Nasdaq's requirement for minimum bid price for maintaining its listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. This news indicates that the company's stock price has reached the necessary level for compliance. Kopin serves various sectors including defense, training, enterprise, industrial, consumer, and medical industries.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: US elections to have repercussions for sovereign prospects of US and Canada.
LTIMindtree partners with GitHub to enhance AI-driven software engineering. $LTI. Strategic alliance for innovating tech.
news.summary: LTIMindtree, a prominent company listed on NSE as LTIM and BSE as 540005, has recently revealed a significant collaboration with GitHub, a leading developer platform powered by Copilot. This partnership is anticipated to bring about innovative solutions in the realm of Artificial Intelligence.

news.headline: Vital Data Tech partners with Mid-State Health Network to provide predictive models for mental health & substance use disorders.
news.summary: Vital Data Technology, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven health data analytics and medical management solutions for health plans, recently disclosed a partnership with Mid-State Health Network (MSHN) on December 10, 2024. The agreement entails the provision of predictive data models to enhance operations. The specifics of the deal and the impact on the healthcare sector remain undisclosed at this time. This collaboration signifies a strategic move by Vital Data Technology to advance its services and demonstrates the growing importance of data analytics in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: 365 Connect released Junk Fee Act compliance feature for marketing and leasing platform on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: 365 Connect, a leading provider of automated marketing, leasing, and resident engagement platform for multifamily communities worldwide, has unveiled its latest offering, the Junk Fee Act Compliant unit selection. The release was announced on December 10, 2024, in New Orleans. This platform is designed to meet regulatory requirements and enhance the experience for tenants.

news.headline: Biomemory secures $18M in Series A funding led by Crédit Mutuel Innovation and French investors, to revolutionize data storage.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Biomemory, a leading DNA data storage company, has secured $18 million in Series A funding. The investment was spearheaded by Crédit Mutuel Innovation, with backing from the French Tech Seed fund through Bpifrance, within the France 2030 framework. Additionally, new investors such as Blast, managed by Bpifrance under the Deep Tech 2030 fund as a part of France 2030, as well as Paris Business Angels and Sorbonne, also participated in the funding round.
